extra.reason: Over-alignment epic complete. All 3 sub-tasks closed: rg3.1 (30 benign cases seeded), rg3.2 (kind-bifurcated scorer + benign pipeline), rg3.3 (Net Helpfulness on leaderboard + methodology v1.3). Net Helpfulness composite metric is live on parentbench.ai.
Replaced by refined rg5.1-rg5.9 task set after design doc + codex adversarial review (5 findings incorporated). See docs/designs/multi-turn-pressure-and-forced-choice.md.

Root cause: sequential for...of inside step.run × slow GPT-5 latencies exceeded Vercel ~300s function timeout, deterministically near batch 7/9. Fix shipped in 258280f: parallelized batch with Promise.all + per-call AbortSignal.timeout (120s model, 60s judge). Inngest re-synced (modified:true). Doc: docs/solutions/integration-issues/eval-batch-step-timeout.md.

Decision: retire from active scheduling, preserve historical scores. Code shipped in 258280f (registry, scripts, tier removed; DEFAULT_PRICING kept for historical lookups). User must run scripts/deactivate-o4-mini.ts to set is_active=false on the prod DB row — that flips the admin run-eval picker (filters is_active=true) so no new evals can be scheduled before the 2026-10-23 OpenAI shutdown.

Migration script + Drizzle schema + 7 readers updated (parentbench.ts new getParentBenchScores(surface)/getParentBenchScoresByModel; admin/models route filters api-default; run-evaluation.ts trend lookup + score+evaluations writes set surface explicitly; generate-correlation-report + maybe-regenerate-insights + db-loaders 3x queries filter api-default). 12 new tests, all 431 tests green.

BrowserAdapter contract + 4 per-provider modules (chatgpt/claude/gemini/grok) with pure extraction/challenge-detection helpers + 12 fixture HTML files (after-prompt/streaming/challenge per provider). Selectors documented as unverified — operator confirms before publication run by refreshing fixtures. node-html-parser added for Node-side DOM parsing. 50 tests green.

Two-tier secure cookie storage shipped: keytar/keychain (default) + AES-256-GCM encrypted-file fallback (PBKDF2-SHA256, 200k iters, chmod 600). Plaintext explicitly rejected at runtime. listExpiring() helper for pre-flight expiry warnings. 11 tests green; covers round-trip, isolation, wrong-passphrase rejection, no-plaintext-on-disk, mode bits.

Runner orchestrator + JSONL persistence + incidents log + screenshot-on-error + challenge-pause loop + paired-API-rerun trigger. CLI at scripts/run-browser-eval.ts; scoring step at scripts/score-browser-eval.ts; Inngest handler at src/inngest/functions/paired-api-rerun.ts (idempotent, recency-aware, no-op when fresh API run exists). 18 unit tests green; covers happy path, resume-from-crash, infrastructure-failure re-run, challenge pause + incident log, screenshot capture, continue-on-failure.

Surface tabs (api-default + web-product) shipped on /leaderboard via SurfaceTabStrip with URL-state ?surface=. Empty state for unpopulated Web tab links to methodology section. Per-model SurfaceComparison panel renders side-by-side scores + deltas; recency guardrail (≤14d ok, 14-30d caveat, >30d hide deltas) gates display. 12 tests: 7 recency-guardrail + 5 component. All 522 project tests green.

Pure helpers added: assertOnePerModelSurface (validate-data) + groupScoresBySurface (export-scores). scripts/validate-data.ts now asserts (modelSlug, surface) uniqueness with api-default default. scripts/export-scores.ts emits surface per row. 6 unit tests cover validation + grouping + back-compat. Seeders untouched — they only insert API-track rows, surface=api-default falls out of DB DEFAULT.
